text.text:
*NEW SLIDE TYPES SIGNALS — 4–10 MAY 2026*

*🔸 Trajectory:*
- Pin on Image: 212 users (WoW +14.6%), 320 times. 4wk: 📉 fading.
- Idea Board: 322 users (WoW +65.1%), 663 times. 4wk: 📈 growing.
- Ranking: 345 users (WoW +12.0%), 568 times. 4wk: 📉 fading.

*🔸 Repeat-use (slides per user, this week):*
- Pin on Image: 1.5
- Idea Board: 2.1
- Ranking: 1.6
- Range across engagement slides: 1.4–2.7

*🔸 Adoption rank (by unique users):*
- Among non-quiz slides: Pin on Image #18, Idea Board #14, Ranking #12
- Among all slide types: Pin on Image #22, Idea Board #18, Ranking #16

*🔸 Notable:*
- Idea Board is the standout: +65% WoW users, climbed 4 places among non-quiz (#18 → #14) and 4 overall (#22 → #18), with 2.1 slides/user matching the top of the existing engagement range.
- Clear divergence — Pin on Image and Ranking both sit below their April peaks (Ranking 345 vs 479 peak; Pin on Image 212 vs 279 peak) while Idea Board keeps accelerating.
- Ranking still nudged up two non-quiz spots WoW (#14 → #12) on a modest +12%.

<https://eu.mixpanel.com/project/2668743/view/3205947/app/boards#id=11071959|Dashboard>

blocks.alt_text: Weekly unique users — new slide types vs engagement-slide range
